seoTitle: How to Integrate Freshdesk With Other Tools
metaDescription: Learn the general steps for integrating Freshdesk with other apps and services to streamline your support workflow.
intro: Freshdesk works best when it's connected to the other tools your business already uses, from CRMs to chat apps. This guide walks through the general process of setting up an integration.

steps.heading: Open the Marketplace or apps section
steps.body: In your Freshdesk admin panel, browse the marketplace or integrations section to find available apps.

steps.heading: Choose the integration you need
steps.body: Select the tool you want to connect, whether it's a CRM, chat platform, or project management app.

steps.heading: Authorize the connection
steps.body: Follow the prompts to log in to the other tool and grant Freshdesk permission to connect.

steps.heading: Configure integration settings
steps.body: Set up any mapping or sync preferences so data flows correctly between Freshdesk and the connected app.

faq.question: What tools can Freshdesk integrate with?
faq.answer: Freshdesk supports a wide range of integrations including CRMs, chat tools, and productivity apps through its marketplace.

faq.question: Do I need admin access to set up an integration?
faq.answer: Yes, connecting third-party apps typically requires administrator permissions on your Freshdesk account.

faq.question: Are Freshdesk integrations free?
faq.answer: Some integrations are free while others may require a paid plan or subscription with the third-party service.

faq.question: Can I disconnect an integration later?
faq.answer: Yes, you can remove or disable an integration at any time from the same settings area where you set it up.
